tasks.label: Proof: repo health
tasks.command: set -euo pipefail; git status --porcelain && echo '---' && git diff --stat && echo '---' && npm --prefix apps/terminal-pro run build:electron

tasks.label: Proof: claim check (IPC/entrypoints)
tasks.command: set -euo pipefail; npm --prefix apps/terminal-pro run check:ipc; rg -n "ipcMain\\.handle\\\(['\"]rina:executePlanStream" apps/terminal-pro/src/main -S | wc -l | rg -q "^1$"; ! rg -n "registerPlanExecutor|planExecutor" apps/terminal-pro/src/main -S

tasks.label: Proof: unit (agent/streaming)
tasks.command: set -euo pipefail; npm --prefix apps/terminal-pro run test:agent; npm --prefix apps/terminal-pro run test:streaming

tasks.label: Proof: e2e (run proof)
tasks.command: set -euo pipefail; npm --prefix apps/terminal-pro run test:e2e:proof
